title: Add assignee to jira integration issue filters
excerpt: Currently you can set up to filter issues by epic, name etc. It would be useful to only import issues relevant to one person so adding a filter for assignee would help

posts.author: R_Savage (Rebecca)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently you can set up to filter issues by epic, name etc. It would be useful to only import issues relevant to one person so adding a filter for assignee would help
